report_config(3) Library Functions Manual report_config(3)

NAME

report_config - Configuration for panic report generation.

SYNOPSIS

Data Fields


const char * log_dir
Directory containing instrumentation log files. const char * log_file
Single log file path (alternative to log_dir). const char * include_filter
File path substring filter for inclusion. const char * exclude_filter
File path substring filter for exclusion. thread_filter_list_t threads
Thread IDs to include in report. bool emit_raw_line
Whether to emit raw log lines in output.

Detailed Description

Configuration for panic report generation.
